etymology.description: 𦝠 (luó, phonetic) + 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry; money") = phonetic indication with a semantic element of wealth -> to win
etymology.interpretation: The character combines the phonetic 𦝠 (luó) with the semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry; money"), symbolizing success or gaining wealth, which aligns with the meaning of 'to win'.
etymology.simplification: The character 贏 was simplified to 赢 by removing complex elements and merging parts for ease of writing.

examples.chinese: 他在比赛中赢得了冠军(他在比賽中贏得了冠軍)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zài bǐsài zhōng yíngdé le guànjūn.
examples.english: He won the championship in the competition.

examples.chinese: 无论如何，我们都要努力去赢(無論如何，我們都要努力去贏)。
examples.pinyin: Wúlùn rúhé, wǒmen dōu yào nǔlì qù yíng.
examples.english: No matter what, we must strive to win.

examples.chinese: 我们的团队在最后一秒逆转赢得了比赛(我們的團隊在最後一秒逆轉贏得了比賽)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen de tuánduì zài zuìhòu yī miǎo nìzhuǎn yíngdé le bǐsài.
examples.english: Our team made a comeback and won the game in the last second.
